languages.text: "Конечно, нет! С моей стороны было бы непрофессионально привносить в работу личные отношения". {n}Медикарий тонко улыбается. У вас появляется настойчивое ощущение, что он сказал вам не всю правду.{/n}

"Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Конечно, нет! С моей стороны было бы непрофессионально привносить в работу личные отношения". {n}Медикарий тонко улыбается. У вас появляется настойчивое ощущение, что он сказал вам не всю правду.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

"Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

"Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

languages.text: 「もちろん仲良くしている！私情を仕事に持ち込むのはプロフェッショナルではない。」{n}マーティナクスは薄く笑う。彼が真実を全て語っていない気がする。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん仲良くしているわ！私情を仕事に持ち込むのはプロフェッショナルではないわ。」マーティナクスは薄く笑う。彼が真実を全て語っていない気がする。

languages.text: "Tabii ki anlaşıyoruz! Kişisel duygularımı işimize karıştırmak, profesyonelce olmazdı." {n}Martinax hafifçe gülümsüyor. Sana tüm gerçekleri anlatmadığı hissine kapılıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tabii ki anlaşıyoruz! Kişisel duygularımı işimize karıştırmak, profesyonelce olmazdı." {n}Martinax hafifçe gülümsüyor. Sana tüm gerçekleri anlatmadığı hissine kapılıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Claro que nos llevamos bien! Sería poco profesional involucrar mis sentimientos personales en nuestro trabajo». {n}Martinax sonríe débilmente. Te da la sensación de que no te ha contado toda la verdad.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Claro que nos llevamos bien! Sería poco profesional involucrar mis sentimientos personales en nuestro trabajo». {n}Martinax sonríe débilmente. Te da la sensación de que no te ha contado toda la verdad.{/n}

languages.text: “我们当然合得来！把个人情绪带入工作也太不专业了。”{n}马丁纳克斯勉强笑了笑。你总觉得他没告诉你全部真相。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我们当然合得来！把个人情绪带入工作也太不专业了。”{n}马丁纳克斯勉强笑了笑。你总觉得他没告诉你全部真相。{/n}

languages.text: « Bien sûr que non ! Je commettrais une faute professionnelle si je laissais mes sentiments personnels influer sur notre travail, » {n}répond Martinax avec un léger sourire. Vous avez la nette impression qu'il ne vous dit pas toute la vérité.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr que non ! Je commettrais une faute professionnelle si je laissais mes sentiments personnels influer sur notre travail, » {n}répond Martinax avec un léger sourire. Vous avez la nette impression qu'il ne vous dit pas toute la vérité.{/n}

languages.text: "Natürlich kommen wir miteinander aus! Es wäre unprofessionell, persönliche Gefühle in unserer Arbeit zuzulassen." {n}Martinax lächelt dünn. Du hast das Gefühl, dass er dir nicht die volle Wahrheit gesagt hat.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course we get along! It would be unprofessional to involve my personal feelings in our work." {n}Martinax smiles thinly. You get the persistent feeling that he has not told you the whole truth.{/n}
